session.authoritative_completion: terminal schema-constrained structured_output after repository inspection, focused verification, two production mutations, exact restoration, and identity checks

structured_output.summary: The candidate is correct and fail-closed, preserves fixed and sustained modes, and has no committed correctness defect. One Low guard gap allows the analyzer's registered horizon shape to drift independently of the harness without a pre-rig test failure.
structured_output.guard_proof: The reviewer relaxed the production payload-volume UUID pin. Exactly test_horizon_payload_volume_identity_is_exact turned red because the substituted UUID was accepted. Exact restoration returned 86 analyzer tests, Bash syntax, and the four-arm self-test green with a clean detached worktree.

findings.title: Pin the analyzer's registered 40-file/40-GiB horizon shape outside the synthetic fixture patch
findings.predicted_failure: An analyzer-only drift to 25 files passes all existing local gates, then voids the live session after staging and transfer because runs.csv no longer matches the analyzer's registered shape.

checks.coverage_probe: changing analyzer EXPECTED_FIXTURES['horizon'] from 40/40 GiB to 25/25 GiB left all 86 tests and the harness self-test green
checks.independent_postcheck: clean detached af13fdb444c94c29f9260fa710918c338d95dd5e with reviewed file hashes restored exactly

policy_note: This is tactical advisory code review, not a formal openreview acceptance verdict.
